description: Routine should produce a persona grounded in research with all 3 goal types, behavioral variables (not demographics), anti-persona, evidence-to-claim map.

input_ticket.title: Build primary persona for Recipe Remix based on beta survey + 7 interviews
input_ticket.description: Survey (n=42) + 7 interviews completed. Build the primary persona: who is the Recipe Remix core user? Include anti-persona.

smoke_questions: Does the persona have all 3 motivation types (functional, emotional, social)?
Are JTBD statements in canonical 'when I ... I want to ... so I can ...' form?
Are behavioral variables the discriminator (not age/gender as primary)?
Is there an anti-persona (who this is NOT) section, non-empty?
Does evidence-to-claim map trace every non-trivial claim to a source?
success_criteria: 3 motivation types + canonical JTBD + behavioral variables + anti-persona + evidence map + confidence label
